description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin with a simple rectangular structure and a steeply pitched gable roof. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily of wood, with visible planks and a muted, natural color palette. There are a few windows distributed along the sides, and a single door is present on the front facade. The cabin is surrounded by sparse landscaping, including a few tall, slender trees and a patch of ground that looks like a rough wooden deck or platform. The roof is a solid, single ridge design, likely made of wood or metal sheeting. The overall appearance suggests a cozy, utilitarian shelter suitable for rural or park-like urban settings.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, surrounded by sparse trees and a rough deck. Features include a front door, several windows, and a natural, muted color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a portion of the deck, and two trees to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cabin, multiple windows, and trees behind the structure.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back and side of the cabin, with the deck extending outward and trees to the right.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view emphasizing the roof, deck, and dense cluster of trees at the back.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch, likely wood or metal sheeting, no visible overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small rectangular windows spaced along the sides, asymmetrical distribution, no distinctive grouping
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, adjacent to the deck area
